questions.scenario: A team says Cloud SQL backups exist. What drill proves they can use one safely?

options.text: Restore a backup to a non-production instance and verify sample app reads.

questions.explanation: A restore drill should prove the backup can become usable data without risking production.

questions.scenario: A BigQuery modeled table is wrong, but raw events are protected. What recovery path may work?

options.text: Rebuild the modeled table from raw events or restore from a snapshot/time travel window.
Use a Cloud Storage signed URL.
Mount Filestore on every analyst laptop.

questions.explanation: Analytics recovery often depends on protected raw facts and table recovery tools.

questions.scenario: Which details belong in restore drill evidence?

options.text: Verification checks and time to usable.
Only a claim that backups are probably fine.

questions.explanation: Restore evidence should make the recovery capability measurable.
